home.heroLead: An encyclopedic, non-commercial reference on Vietnam's Constitution, codes, court system, and litigation procedure — clearly written, cited, bilingual (Vietnamese + English).

updates.title: Recent Vietnamese legal instruments
updates.lead: Recently issued Vietnamese legal instruments — laws, codes, decrees, circulars, resolutions, decisions, directives, official letters, and technical standards. Every entry links straight to the original on thuvienphapluat.vn (which mirrors the official Cổng VBPL — vbpl.vn).
updates.attribution: Source: thuvienphapluat.vn / vbpl.vn (the Ministry of Justice's official normative-document portal). Titles are reproduced verbatim from the original; the English line is a literal translation of the title only — not a content summary.

footer.disclaimer: Content is informational only and does not substitute for individualized legal advice.

blog.title: Editorial blog
blog.lead: Commentary, case analysis, practice updates, and policy notes on the Vietnamese legal system — written by Apolo Editorial.
blog.noResults: No posts match the current filter.

timeline.title: Eight decades of Vietnamese codification
timeline.lead: From the 1946 Constitution to the 2026 Personal Data Protection Law — the spine of modern Vietnamese statute, milestone by milestone.

trustedSources.caption: Drawn from primary sources
trustedSources.subcaption: Every entry traces back to an authoritative state portal.

recentUpdates.title: What was issued this quarter
recentUpdates.lead: The newest Vietnamese laws, decrees, circulars, and resolutions — sourced verbatim from vbpl.vn / thuvienphapluat.vn.
